docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $600.00 FILED BY SAFEWAY PEST CONTROL AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDEN DRAGON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-19-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
